descriptionInUI: Runtime for the 'Host tool: F10 red-interceptor scramble menu' setting. Inert unless the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.redScramble (the setting is on and red fighter templates + red airfields exist). Adds an F10 'HOST: Red Scramble' menu that clones a 2/4-ship red interceptor flight at any listed red airfield and continuously vectors it onto the nearest airborne BLUE fighters (players preferred) until it dies -- the game master's 'give the flight something to shoot' button. 'Host player names' restricts the menu to DCS player names containing any of the comma-separated entries (case-insensitive substring match, so a static tag like 'Flash' covers 'Viper 1-1 | Flash' whatever the flight prefix); left empty, every BLUE client sees it. Spawned bandits are free, untracked event content: killing them changes nothing at the campaign turn boundary.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Host player names or name fragments (comma-separated; empty = all BLUE see the menu)
Spawn mode: air (overhead, instant), hot (ramp) or runway
